steps.title: Focus on length comparison
steps.content: The student's goal is to compare the lengths of the two rail tunnels. A successful sentence must include both tunnels' lengths and show how the lengths relate.

steps.title: Require both tunnel lengths
steps.content: A only says some tunnels are longer than 30 miles, C describes one tunnel, and D identifies both as rail tunnels without comparing lengths. The matching choice gives 33 miles and 31 miles and states that one is slightly shorter. The answer is B.
